Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Known Subinterfaces:
ArrayVerifier<A,​E>, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier, BigDecimalVerifier, BooleanVerifier, ClassVerifier<T>, CollectionVerifier<C,​E>, ComparableVerifier<T>, ExtensibleArrayVerifier<S,​A,​E>, ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>, ExtensibleCollectionVerifier<S,​C,​E>, ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<S,​T>, FloatingPointVerifier<T>, InetAddressVerifier, IntegerVerifier<T>, ListVerifier<L,​E>, MapVerifier<K,​V>, MultimapVerifier<K,​V>, NumberVerifier<T>, ObjectVerifier<T>, OptionalVerifier, PathVerifier, PrimitiveBooleanVerifier, PrimitiveCharacterVerifier, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>, PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>, SizeVerifier, StringVerifier, UriVerifier, UrlVerifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractArrayVerifier, AbstractArrayVerifierNoOp, AbstractBooleanVerifier, AbstractComparableVerifier, AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp, AbstractFloatingPointVerifier, AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, AbstractNumberVerifier, AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp, AbstractObjectVerifier, AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp, AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, ArrayVerifierImpl, ArrayVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierNoOp, BooleanVerifierImpl, BooleanVerifierNoOp, ClassVerifierImpl, ClassVerifierNoOp, CollectionVerifierImpl, CollectionVerifierNoOp, ComparableVerifierImpl, ComparableVerifierNoOp, DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatingPointVerifierNoOp, FloatVerifierImpl, InetAddressVerifierImpl, InetAddressVerifierNoOp, IntegerVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierNoOp, ListVerifierImpl, ListVerifierNoOp, LongVerifierImpl, MapVerifierImpl, MapVerifierNoOp, NumberVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierNoOp, ObjectVerifierImpl, ObjectVerifierNoOp, OptionalVerifierImpl, OptionalVerifierNoOp, PathVerifierImpl, PathVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, SizeVerifierImpl, SizeVerifierNoOp, StringVerifierImpl, StringVerifierNoOp, UriVerifierImpl, UriVerifierNoOp, UrlVerifierImpl, UrlVerifierNoOp
public interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Object but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be an ObjectVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringVerifier asString()
    Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.
    S asString​(Consumer<StringVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    T getActual()
    Returns the actual value.
    boolean isActualAvailable()
    Indicates if the actual value is available.
    S isEqualTo​(Object expected)
    Ensures that the actual value is equal to an expected value.
    S isEqualTo​(Object expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is equal to the expected value.
    S isInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is an instance of a class.
    S isNotEqualTo​(Object other)
    Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another value.
    S isNotEqualTo​(Object other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another variable.
    S isNotInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is not an instance of a class.
    S isNotNull()
    Ensures that the actual value is not null.
    S isNotOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
    Ensures that the actual value is not one of the elements in a collection.
    S isNotSameObjectAs​(Object other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value does not reference a specific object.
    S isNull()
    Ensures that the actual value is null.
    S isOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
    Ensures that the actual value is one of the elements in a collection.
    S isSameObjectAs​(Object expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual and expected objects are one and the same object.

  • Method Details

    • isEqualTo

      S isEqualTo​(Object expected)
      Ensures that the actual value is equal to an expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not equal to value
      See Also:
      An explanation of the output format

    • isEqualTo

      S isEqualTo​(Object expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is equal to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      name - the name of the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not equal to expected. If name is empty.
      See Also:
      An explanation of the output format

    • isNotEqualTo

      S isNotEqualTo​(Object other)
      Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the value to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is equal to value

    • isNotEqualTo

      S isNotEqualTo​(Object other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not equal to another variable.
      Parameters:
      other - the value to compare to
      name - the name of the variable
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is equal to other. If name is empty.

    • isSameObjectAs

      S isSameObjectAs​(Object expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual and expected objects are one and the same object.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected object
      name - the name of the expected object
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual != expected. If name is empty.

    • isNotSameObjectAs

      S isNotSameObjectAs​(Object other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value does not reference a specific object.
      Parameters:
      other - the object to compare to
      name - the name of the other object
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual == other. If name is empty.

    • isOneOf

      S isOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Ensures that the actual value is one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is valid.
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if collection is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if collection does not contain the actual value

    • isNotOneOf

      S isNotOneOf​(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Ensures that the actual value is not one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is not a reserved value.
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if collection is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if collection contains the actual value

    • isInstanceOf

      S isInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is an instance of a class.
      Parameters:
      type - the class to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not an instance of type

    • isNotInstanceOf

      S isNotInstanceOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is not an instance of a class.
      Parameters:
      type - the class to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is an instance of type

    • isNull

      S isNull()
      Ensures that the actual value is null.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not null

    • isNotNull

      S isNotNull()
      Ensures that the actual value is not null.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the actual value is null

    • asString

      StringVerifier asString()
      Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.
      Returns:
      a verifier for the String representation of the actual value

    • asString

      S asString​(Consumer<StringVerifier> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the String representation of the actual value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null

    • isActualAvailable

      boolean isActualAvailable()
      Indicates if the actual value is available.
      Returns:
      false if assertThat() was invoked and assertions are disabled (in which case the value was discarded)

    • getActual

      T getActual()
      Returns the actual value. The return value is undefined if isActualAvailable() is false.
      Returns:
      the actual value
